title: Production security & paywall audit
note: Repository audit + header hardening. Live HTTP/Stripe/CDN steps require operator execution on production; this file records evidence and blockers.
overallSummary: Local tree has unresolved merge conflicts (UU/AA paths). Do NOT deploy until main is clean, reviewed, and CI green. Cache-Control for /app and /api strengthened in next.config.ts (private, no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate).

step1_deployTarget.digitalOceanAppPlatform: VERIFY_IN_DO_UI — confirm repo erikagodin6-jpg/nursenest-core, branch main, source_dir nursenest-core
step1_deployTarget.productionCommitHash: REQUIRED_OPERATOR — compare App Platform deployment commit to git rev-parse origin/main after push
commands: git fetch origin && git rev-parse HEAD && git rev-parse origin/main
On DO: App → Settings → Components → compare deployed commit to GitHub

recommended: Clear DO build cache / trigger deploy with clean build if platform supports it
npm ci && npm run build:verify (or CI pipeline) on the exact commit being deployed
prisma migrate deploy against production DATABASE_URL (maintenance window if needed)

layers.name: DigitalOcean CDN / App Platform edge
layers.action: Redeploy or use DO purge tools if fronting static assets; confirm no shared cache for /app HTML

layers.name: Cloudflare
layers.action: If proxied: purge cache for site or purge by URL prefix /app /api after deploy

layers.name: Next.js
layers.action: New deployment invalidates build output; ISR not used for /app (force-dynamic layouts). On-demand revalidate for blog/marketing if applicable via existing cron routes

step4_cacheHeaders.dynamicLayouts: Learner and marketing route groups use export const dynamic = "force-dynamic" on key layouts (see codebase grep).

step5_searchEngineProtection.marketingPathwayLessons: Public lesson URLs are indexable with preview-safe metadata; premium sections gated by fullAccess in page (see paywall static tests).

checklist: Anonymous: open marketing lesson URL — HTML must not contain full premium sections / rationales
Paid: sign in — /app lessons and questions show full content
View source / search for answer text — should not appear for anonymous on gated surfaces

patterns: /api/lessons — session required; resolveEntitlement + subscriber branch uses lessonAccessWhere
/api/questions/[id] — freemium path excludes rationale; 403 for rationale without sub

step8_stripeEntitlement.cron: POST /api/cron/stripe-reconcile with CRON_SECRET; STRIPE_RECONCILE_CRON_APPLY for apply mode
step8_stripeEntitlement.liveTest: REQUIRED — checkout test mode or staging; verify past_due policy via ENTITLEMENT_PAST_DUE_POLICY

step9_cdnCacheLeak.notes: After deploy, verify incognito vs logged-out session for same /app URL returns login or empty shell without premium JSON in network tab from cache.

checks: hreflang: verify on localized marketing pages per i18n policy

remainingRisks.risk: Unresolved git merge conflicts — deploying from this tree could ship broken or partial code.
remainingRisks.mitigation: Resolve all UU/AA files, run typecheck and test:paywall-surface-policy, merge to main, then deploy.

remainingRisks.risk: Third-party CDN not purged after deploy could serve old marketing HTML briefly.
remainingRisks.mitigation: Purge edge cache for hostname after production promotion; confirm Cache-Control on responses.

remainingRisks.risk: Marketing pathway lessons intentionally expose preview content for SEO; answers must remain in subscriber-only APIs and /app.
remainingRisks.mitigation: Periodic manual spot-check + API curl tests after releases.

confirmation.zeroPaywallBypassPossible: Not proven in production — architecture and tests support SECURE; live pentest pending
confirmation.zeroApiLeaks: Not proven against production — handlers enforce server-side entitlement
confirmation.zeroCachedPremiumContent: Mitigated by headers + force-dynamic; live CDN purge recommended
confirmation.seoSafe: robots + sitemap policy consistent with indexability-policy.ts
